info.title: AgentForge Go Backend API
info.summary: 当前 src-go Echo 服务端接口的标准 OpenAPI 文档
info.description:
This document is derived from the live route wiring in `src-go/internal/server/routes.go` and the current request/response DTOs under `src-go/internal/model` and `src-go/internal/handler`.

Notes:
- Default local server: `http://localhost:7777`.
- Most `/api/v1/**` endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.
- Public exceptions: health checks, auth register/login/refresh, public forms, IM ingress/control-plane ingress, review trigger/ci-result, internal scheduler/plugin runtime sync endpoints, and WebSocket handshakes.
- Several plugin / bridge / dashboard / workflow / IM payloads are intentionally schema-loose because the backend itself accepts plugin-defined or JSONB-backed objects.

get.description: JWT-backed websocket handshake for frontend event updates. The token is resolved from `?token=` or `Authorization: Bearer ...`.
Bridge runtime websocket for agent streaming/control events.
IM bridge control-plane websocket for backend-to-bridge deliveries.

bearerAuth.description: JWT bearer token. Review trigger endpoints also accept the configured service token in the same Authorization bearer slot.

BridgeClassifyIntentResponse.description: Bridge intent classification response proxied from the TS bridge.

BridgeGenerateResponse.description: Bridge text generation response proxied from the TS bridge.

BridgePoolSummary.description: Bridge pool summary response proxied from the TS bridge.

BridgeRuntimeCatalog.description: Bridge runtime catalog response proxied from the TS bridge.

BridgeTaskDecomposeResponse.description: Bridge task decomposition response proxied from the TS bridge.

CostAccountingSnapshot.description: Authoritative/estimated cost accounting snapshot; fields may expand with runtime support.

DispatchAttemptDTO.description: Dispatch attempt audit record. Exact shape follows internal dispatch observability DTOs.

IMNativeMessage.description: Platform-native IM payload; only one provider-specific subpayload is typically populated.

MarketplaceSideloadRequest.description: Marketplace sideload request; current handler accepts marketplace item metadata and local artifact source details.

PluginInstallRequest.description: Accepts one of several install forms (path, entry_id, or path+source).

PluginManifest.description: Plugin manifest document for local/catalog/marketplace installs.

PluginRecord.description: Installed plugin record with manifest, lifecycle, source, runtime metadata, and current instance state.

PluginRuntimeStatus.description: Runtime enable/disable status for a Bridge plugin.

PluginUpdateRequest.description: Plugin update input with path/source information.

RoleExecutionProfile.description: Role execution profile including tools, skills, and runtime readiness.

RoleManifest.description: Role manifest JSON/YAML document returned by the current file-backed role store.

TaskProgressSnapshotDTO.description: Task progress snapshot; shape is service-generated and may expand over time.
